sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO review (product_id, member_id, rating, title, body, reg_date, verified) VALUES (#productId#, #memberId#, #rating#, #title#, #body#, #regDate#, #verified#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.member_id, r.rating, r.title, r.body, r.reg_date, m.name AS member_name FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.product_id = #productId# ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT #size# OFFSET #offset#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE product_id = #productId#

SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS review_cnt, COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0) AS avg_rating, SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS positive_cnt FROM review WHERE product_id = #productId# GROUP BY product_id

SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.member_id, r.rating, r.title, r.body, r.reg_date, r.helpful_count, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id WHERE po.product_id = r.product_id AND o.member_id = r.member_id AND o.status = 2) THEN 'VERIFIED' ELSE 'UNVERIFIED' END AS PURCHASE_STATE FROM review r WHERE r.product_id = #productId# ORDER BY r.helpful_count DESC, r.review_id DESC LIMIT #size# OFFSET #offset#

SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(rating*(helpful_count+1)),0) AS WEIGHT_NUM, COALESCE(SUM(helpful_count+1),0) AS WEIGHT_DEN, COALESCE(SUM(rating*(helpful_count+1))*100/SUM(helpful_count+1),0) AS WEIGHTED_SCORE_X100 FROM review WHERE product_id = #productId# GROUP BY product_id

SELECT 5 AS STAR, SUM(CASE WHEN rating=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT FROM review WHERE product_id=#productId# UNION ALL SELECT 4, SUM(CASE WHEN rating=4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM review WHERE product_id=#productId# UNION ALL SELECT 3, SUM(CASE WHEN rating=3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM review WHERE product_id=#productId# UNION ALL SELECT 2, SUM(CASE WHEN rating=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM review WHERE product_id=#productId# UNION ALL SELECT 1, SUM(CASE WHEN rating=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM review WHERE product_id=#productId# ORDER BY STAR DESC
SELECT review_id, product_id, member_id, rating, title, helpful_count FROM review WHERE product_id = #productId# ORDER BY helpful_count DESC LIMIT #size#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r WHERE r.product_id = #productId# AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id=o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id=po.option_id WHERE po.product_id = r.product_id AND o.member_id = r.member_id AND o.status = 2)
